description: Full Venice AI prompt catalog for Everything Is Cow. Templates for batch expansion; featured subset lives in venice_prompts.json.
master_template: [OBJECT DESCRIPTION], Minecraft pixel art texture, flat shading, no anti-aliasing, limited color palette, cow-themed (black and white Holstein patches, pink udder accents), top-down view, seamless tileable, crisp pixel edges, no background noise
strategy: Generate at 1024×1024, downscale nearest-neighbor to 16/32/64/128/256/512. Do NOT put pixel dimensions in text prompts — set width/height in API params only.

stone_ore_family.desc: Gray stone with Holstein black and white spotted pattern replacing gray stone grain, fossilized hoof print
Cow hide pattern with dark black ore spots on white cowhide background
Cow-spotted pattern with tan/beige ore flecks on Holstein base
Golden-yellow ore spots on black and white cow hide pattern
Cyan-blue diamond shapes scattered on Holstein cow pattern background
Green emerald crystals on black and white cow spotted stone
Glowing red dots on cow-patterned gray stone
Blue lapis flecks on Holstein cow pattern stone
Orange-copper spots on cow-patterned stone background
Dark cow hide pattern with charcoal and dark gray patches

dirt_grass_nature.desc: Green grass blades forming cow spot patterns
Green grass top strip over brown dirt with subtle cow spot pattern
Brown earth with cow-print muddy patches in darker brown
Tan sandy surface with subtle cream and white cow spot pattern
Gray pebbles arranged in cow spot cluster pattern
Light gray clay with faint Holstein cow markings
Dark brown mud with cow hoofprint impressions
Purple-gray fungal surface with cow spot pattern
Dark brown soil with cow-patterned leaf debris
White snow with very faint gray cow spot shadows

wood_family.template: {wood} {variant}, bark/wood with cow spot pattern in natural wood tones, vertical grain for logs

nether_blocks.desc: Dark red surface with black cow spot pattern
Dark brown sand with screaming cow face impressions
Dark gray columnar stone with cow-patterned vertical stripes
Very dark stone with subtle charcoal cow spots
Dark red bricks with cow-spot mortar pattern
Teal-blue fungal surface with cyan cow spots
Dark red fungal surface with red-black cow spots
Bright yellow glowing surface with white cow spot pattern
Warm orange glowing surface with cream cow spots

bosses.desc: Dragon with cow-spotted scales, cow horns, Holstein wings
Three cow skull heads, cow-patterned dark body
Large fish with cow-spotted pale scales and cow eye

environment.desc: Circular sun with happy cow face, yellow glow
Moon with cow spots, white glow
White rain drops shaped like tiny milk drops
White snowflakes shaped like tiny cow spots

gui.desc: Cow-patterned border frame with wooden cow-branded interior
MINECRAFT text made of cow spots pattern

personalization.desc: Brindal & Grayson's COW WORLD in playful bouncy cow-spotted letters
Two baby cows labeled B and G wearing crowns, meadow background
Child in cow costume onesie with hood ears, labeled Brindal
Child in cow costume onesie with hood horns and spots, labeled Grayson
